answers.label: High School Student / No degree yet
I like solving problems & thinking analytically
I'm not sure — show me all options

milestones.title: Certification
milestones.description: (Optional) Complete an online certificate, bootcamp, or structured course in cloud DevOps engineer to build a strong learning foundation

milestones.title: Core Skill Learning
milestones.description: Learn the fundamentals: build a solid foundation in ci/cd pipeline implementation (jenkins, github actions), containerisation (docker, kubernetes), and infrastructure as code (terraform, ansible) — these are the essential building blocks for a cloud DevOps engineer

resources.title: Introduction to Linux by The Linux Foundation
Automate the Boring Stuff with Python
AWS Cloud Practitioner Essentials (Free Digital Course)
The Bits and Bytes of Computer Networking (Google IT Support Certificate)

milestones.title: Intermediate / Advanced Skills
milestones.description: Deepen your expertise by developing intermediate-to-advanced skills in cloud platforms (aws, azure, gcp), monitoring and alerting (prometheus, grafana), and scripting (bash, python), applying them through exercises and case studies

milestones.title: Hands-on Practice
milestones.description: Gain hands-on experience by completing software projects, open-source contributions, or technical prototypes — focus on applying ci/cd pipeline implementation (jenkins, github actions), and containerisation (docker, kubernetes) in realistic scenarios

milestones.title: Portfolio Building
milestones.description: Build a professional portfolio: publish your best projects on GitHub, create a personal website showcasing your work, and document your process and results

milestones.title: CV / Profile Building
milestones.description: Prepare your professional profile: craft a targeted CV/resume highlighting your cloud DevOps engineer skills, optimize your LinkedIn profile, and gather references or endorsements from mentors, instructors, or past collaborators

milestones.title: Job Application / Freelancing
milestones.description: Apply for cloud DevOps engineer positions through job boards, company career pages, professional networks, and industry-specific platforms — tailor each application and prepare to discuss your hands-on experience and portfolio in interviews
